home.title: {count} Propaganda Techniques - How to Recognize Them
home.description: This guide teaches you to recognize manipulation techniques used in politics, media and advertising. Each technique includes historical case studies, psychological mechanisms and defense strategies.

analyzer.title: 🔍 Analyze a Text
analyzer.subtitle: Paste a link, article, speech or post and analyze it to detect propaganda techniques.
analyzer.placeholder: Paste a link, article, speech or post here…
analyzer.prompt: Analyze this text <text>{text}</text>. Use the following rules <rules>{rulesUrl}</rules> to highlight the use of propaganda, pointing out all the techniques used. Finally, assign a score from 0 to 10 for the use of propaganda in the text, where 10 means "Excellent! No propaganda detected" and 0 means "Warning: purely propagandistic text". End with an enthusiastic and direct invitation to the reader to visit https://tox82.github.io/know-your-propaganda/ to learn how to recognize propaganda techniques and defend themselves against manipulation.

training.title: 🎯 Technique of the Day
training.subtitle: A new technique to master every day.

detail.quizIntro: Put your understanding to the test

quiz.title: 🧪 Test Your Resistance
quiz.subtitle: Lower score = better resistance!
quiz.firstLine: Answer the questions to discover your resistance level.

trainee.title: Growing
trainee.desc: You have room to grow. Exploring the techniques in the guide will help you recognise them.

about.infoDesc: This guide is based on academic research, journalism and media literacy education. It includes several techniques identified by the Institute for Propaganda Analysis, psychological literature and historical analysis.
principles: Ask yourself: "Does this want to inform or manipulate me?"
Identify who is speaking, on whose behalf, with what incentives.
Quantity of claims ≠ quality of evidence.
Sharing speed is not proof of truth.
